title: hieracium pteropogon subsp. pogonites
intro: Hieracium pteropogon subsp. pogonites, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Hieracium pteropogon subsp. pogonites include treating urinary tract infections, reducing inflammation and fever, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
